description: Style NoteAdd a pop of colour to your Summer wear wardrobe with this top from myntra. Featuring a colourful, all over butterfly print and made from pure cotton this piece scores high on style as well as comfort. Accessorise it with beaded bracelets and strappy wedge heels for an effortless yet inspired look.Product DetailsWhite butterfly printed top, sleeveless, round neck, drawstrings at the shoulder, curved and vented hemMaterials and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model( height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
